part1:
Hello,

You have been invited to contribute to the **{agenda}** agenda!

It seems you haven't entered any events yet — do you need a hand getting started? 👍

To find all the agendas you are a member of, go to your "**my agendas**" page and click "add an event" under the name of the agenda you wish to contribute to:
part2:
Enter all your event information in the form. You can save a draft to complete the information later or "create the event".

Once the event form is submitted, your event will go through a moderation step by the agenda administrators. You will be notified by email as soon as your listing is published.

To find all the events you have entered, go to the "**my events**" page:
part3: **Not sure about something?** Check out our documentation articles or contact our support team.
subject: {agenda} ➡️ Start entering your events today!
unsubscribe: Unsubscribe from this type of emails
